text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Today is the first day of summer camp!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to become so strong during camp that
not even my family's jinx will be able to hold any
sway over me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
To help her with that, I plan to focus on basic
training since the best foundation for building
crushing strength is a healthy body.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One of our other goals will be to help her gain the
endurance required to run all 3,000 meters of the
Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Come on, hurry! Let's check out our rooms!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Hey, don't you think you're getting a bit carried
away?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I can't help it! We're by the ocean! Woo, let's
train our hearts out again this year!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha! Looks like I'm not the only one who's
excited!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. You're not the only one eager to train! I
have to make sure I win the Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to win it, just like you did. I'll break the
Satono jinx and become someone worthy of being
your rival!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Dia! I know you can do it! And once you do,
we can run together again.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Their fierce cries of determination echo across
the summer sky. It seems summer camp is going to
be a hot one this year!
